title: Classic Shaders
description: A shader-focused modpack that transforms Minecraft with realistic lighting, shadows, reflections, and vibrant colors. Includes performance optimizations to keep gameplay smooth while delivering stunning visuals.
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4c4040aaca2d033e57de198b7c7a4b6a946e424.png)

This shader-based modpack redefines the look and feel of Minecraft by combining powerful shader support with visual enhancements and performance optimizations. Enjoy natural lighting that reacts to the time of day, soft shadows that move with the sun, reflective and dynamic water surfaces, volumetric clouds, bloom effects, realistic fog, and vibrant color grading that gives each environment a unique atmosphere.

From glowing sunsets to moody caves and crystal-clear bodies of water, every moment feels cinematic and immersive. The pack supports a wide range of shaders—from lightweight, low-end-friendly options to high-end photorealistic shaders—allowing players to tailor the visual experience to their PC’s capabilities.

To maintain stability and smooth gameplay, the modpack includes essential performance mods that improve FPS, reduce stuttering, and handle shader-heavy rendering more efficiently. The result is a visually stunning yet playable experience suitable for builders, explorers, content creators, or anyone who wants Minecraft to look modern and alive.

Perfect for players seeking a beautiful, atmospheric, and customizable visual experience in Minecraft without altering vanilla gameplay mechanics.
